events.title: Battery-free Gram-scale Robots that Move Autonomously
events.location: 290 Hearst Mining Memorial Building, UC Berkeley
events.description: Kyle Johnson presents on battery-free autonomous microrobots that can fly in the wind or drive independently on the ground using microwatts of harvested energy from light or radio waves. These mobile sensing platforms could have a transformative impact in applications from agricultural monitoring, hazardous infrastructure inspection, exploring extraterrestrial environments, and reconfiguring camera networks.
